opportunities.description: Min open opps in current month; min Omega opps; stages for reopened

events.description: Minimum number of Events in the next N days

activity.description: Open Omega opps have activity; requireAllCurrentQuarterForAgent: if false, pass when at least minOmega current-quarter opps have recent activity (avoids fail when script can't see all opps)

staleDays.description: Key objects should have been modified within this many days
